title: Entry
description: Any entry available for selection on the store menu.

available.description:
Whether or not the entry is available.
If this property is undefined, then the entry will be marked as available.

defaultSelections.description: Options which should be selected by default

displayType.description:
Recommendations for display of options

* `LIST`: Display options in any "list" format, to make all options visible ("Lettuce", "Tomato")
* `STEPPER`: Display options in a "stepper" format, to mask options behind an increment/decrement interface ("No Lettuce", "Lettuce", "Extra Lettuce")
* `BOOLEAN`: Display options in a "boolean" format, allowing guests to toggle between options ("No Bacon", "Bacon")
* `SINGLE_ENTRY`: One option that maps to options to select from
* `SELECT`: Group with Single Selection Option
* `MULTI-SELECT`: Group with Multiple Selection Options
* `COLLAPSED`: Group that should be collapsed

entries.description:
Collection of references to the item's options. Options may
themselves be items or a grouping of items collected in an
"Options Group". The item's options define a parent-child
relationship.

dayParts.description:
Collection of references to the item's day parts. The item should only
be available during the associated day parts.

description.example:
Notre sandwich WHOPPER® est fait d'un quart de livre de savoureux bœuf grillé sur le feu, garni de tomates juteuses, de laitue fraîche, de mayonnaise onctueuse, de cornichons croquants et d'oignons blancs émincés.
Le tout est servi sur un pain aux graines de sésame grillé à point.
